task_completion.description: Verify the amendment is being recorded for the correct patient, Jayson Fadel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the patient name 'Jayson Fadel', PID '3', or DOB '1992-06-30' in the patient header or active chart context.

task_completion.description: Verify that a medical record amendment entry has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open or saved amendment form, note, or record specifically designated for a medical record amendment or correction.

task_completion.description: Verify the amendment description accurately reflects the patient's request regarding their occupation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for keywords such as 'occupation', 'employment', 'nurse', 'LPN', or 'correction' in the description or details text area of the amendment.

task_completion.description: Verify the amendment status is set to 'Approved'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown, radio button, or text field indicating the status of the amendment is 'Approved' or 'Accepted'.

task_completion.description: Verify the provider's response is documented in the amendment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Amendment approved. Occupation field has been updated...' in the response, action taken, or provider comments section.

task_completion.description: Verify the amendment was created newly during the task session.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a current date/time stamp on the amendment record, or evidence of the agent actively typing and saving the new record in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenEMR web interface to record the amendment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenEMR web application in a browser, not a terminal or database client executing SQL commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenEMR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine OpenEMR layout, not a text editor or mock application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script or terminal to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL commands or script executions to insert the amendment directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Jayson Fadel (PID: 3, DOB: 1992-06-30). Amendment Type: Correction. Expected keywords in description: 'occupation', 'employment', 'nurse', 'lpn', 'correction'. The amendment must be marked as 'Approved' and include the response about updating the occupation field.
